objective: Find the perimeter of polygons by adding side lengths and using a ruler to measure

pretest.question: Which formula gives the perimeter of a rectangle?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 직사각형 둘레 — P = (가로+세로) × 2
learn.content: To find the perimeter of any polygon, add all the side lengths together. For a rectangle with length 8 cm and width 3 cm: P = 8 + 3 + 8 + 3 = 22 cm. You can also use the formula P = (l + w) × 2. (8 + 3) × 2 = 11 × 2 = 22 cm. 예: A rectangle is 6 cm long and 4 cm wide. Use the formula P = (l + w) × 2. What is the perimeter? → 20 cm. ((6 + 4) × 2 = 10 × 2 = 20 cm.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 정사각형 둘레 — P = 변 × 4
learn.content: For a square, all 4 sides are equal. You can multiply one side by 4. P = side × 4. Example: A square with side 9 ft. P = 9 × 4 = 36 ft. 예: A square has a side of 6 meters. Use P = side × 4. What is the perimeter? → 24 meters. (6 × 4 = 24 meters.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 자로 측정 — 모든 변 같은 단위
learn.content: You can use a ruler to measure each side of a real shape, then add them up. Measure every side carefully in the same unit. Example: A hexagon measured with sides 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2 cm. P = 2 × 6 = 12 cm. 예: You measure a triangle's sides: 5 cm, 7 cm, and 9 cm. What is the perimeter? → 21 cm. (5 + 7 + 9 = 21 cm.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 공식 P = 2(l+w) — 직사각형 빠른 계산
learn.content: 직사각형 둘레 공식 두 가지 (같은 결과):   ① P = l + w + l + w (네 변 차례로 더하기)   ② P = 2 × (l + w) (가로+세로 합 × 2) 예: l=7, w=3 → ② 2×(7+3) = 2×10 = 20. 🔍 ②번이 큰 수에서 더 빠름.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 두 방법으로 검산 — 같은 답 나와야
learn.content: 공식 ①과 ② 결과가 같은지 확인. 예: l=8, w=5 → ① 8+5+8+5 = 26 → ② 2×(8+5) = 26 ✓ 🔍 검산 습관: 답이 다르면 어딘가 계산 오류. 정사각형도 마찬가지: 변+변+변+변 = 변×4.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 실생활 단위 — cm/m/in/ft 통일
learn.content: 실제 물건 둘레 측정: 모든 변을 같은 단위로 측정 후 합.   ⚠️ cm와 m, in과 ft 섞으면 안 됨. 예: 책상 가로 80 cm, 세로 60 cm → P = 2×(80+60) = 280 cm = 2.8 m. 🔍 실수 방지: 단위 통일 후 계산.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 불규칙 다각형 — 한 바퀴 + 단위
learn.content: 오각형, 육각형, L자 등 변이 많은 도형: 한 꼭짓점부터 시계방향으로 한 바퀴 돌며 더함. 예: 오각형 변 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 in → P = 3+4+5+6+7 = 25 in. 🖍️ 팁: 변마다 ✓ 표시 — 누락 방지(M07).   단위는 길이 단위 (cm/in 등) — 절대 cm² ❌.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 추정으로 검산 — 합리적인 답인가?
learn.content: 계산 후 '말이 되나?' 검산. 예: 가로 10, 세로 5 직사각형 → P가 100? ❌ 너무 큼 (그건 넓이!).   추정: 모든 변 ≈ 10이면 P ≈ 4×10 = 40. 실제 30. 가까움. ✓ 🔍 100이 나오면 곱했을 가능성 (M01: 둘레↔넓이 혼동).

practice_r3.question: A rectangle has a perimeter of 30 cm. The length is 9 cm. What is the width? Show your work.
practice_r3.answer: Width = 6 cm. Two lengths = 9 + 9 = 18. Remaining = 30 − 18 = 12. Two widths = 12, so width = 12 ÷ 2 = 6 cm.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: A square and a rectangle both have a perimeter of 24 cm. The rectangle is 8 cm long. What is the side length of the square? What is the width of the rectangle?
practice_r3.answer: Square side = 6 cm (24 ÷ 4 = 6). Rectangle width: (8 + w) × 2 = 24 → 8 + w = 12 → w = 4 cm.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: Explain the difference between the formulas P = l + l + w + w and P = (l + w) × 2. Do they give the same answer? Give an example.
practice_r3.answer: Yes, both give the same answer. Example: l = 5, w = 3. P = 5 + 5 + 3 + 3 = 16. P = (5 + 3) × 2 = 8 × 2 = 16. The second formula is a shortcut.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.2 'Find Perimeter' pp.417-420
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Topic D — Perimeter of Polygons
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: A regular hexagon has each side measuring 7 cm. Find the perimeter using TWO different methods and show both calculations.
accept: 더하기 방법 42 cm, 곱하기 방법 42 cm
practice_r3.explanation: 정육각형 6변이 모두 같음 → 더하기와 곱하기 결과 동일. 42 cm.
